headline: Ethereum Ups Quantum Security for $0.07 Per Account

headline: $36M Crypto Hack Linked to North Korea Actors

article.title: Humanity Protocol’s $36M hack tied to suspected North Korean hackers: Quantstamp
article.summary: A fake Bithumb email used in the $36 million Humanity Protocol hack points to the involvement of North Korean threat actors, according to Quantstamp.

headline: Iran Deal Doubts Hit $10B Oil Futures

article.title: Rep. Olszewski Expresses Skepticism Over Iran MOU Details
article.summary: Democratic member of the Foreign Affairs Committee Rep. Johnny Olszewski joins David Gura and Christina Ruffini on Bloomberg This Weekend and expresses his skepticism about the finalization of a deal with Tehran, noting Iran's own uncertainty about signing the agreement. (Source: Bloomberg)
